title: Saul & Ruby's Holocaust Survivor Band
overview: In this utterly heart-affecting and enthralling film, two Holocaust survivors in South Florida form a klezmer band and begin an extraordinary musical journey that celebrates life and the transcendent power of music to heal.

trailers.title: Saul and Ruby's holocaust survivor band, directed by Tod Lending,  Doc Edge Festival 2020
